title: Replication packet: Regime-Dependent Predictability in the SBIR Phase II to Venture Capital Pipeline

creators.name: Khunjua, Tamaz
creators.affiliation: School of Science and Technology, University of Georgia, Tbilisi, Georgia

description: Anonymised firm-level data and code to reproduce the main numerical results (Table 1, Table A.4, Section 5.1 paired bootstrap, Figure 1) of the paper on regime-dependent SBIR Phase II to venture-capital follow-on predictability. Code is MIT-licensed; data are CC-BY-4.0. Derived from public U.S. SBIR/STTR awards and SEC Form D filings.
